OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Monelle Palencia, Esq. for and with Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Phillip Morgan, Esq., representing the Defendant Flora Brooks through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renee, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502-A, for settlement discussions.

Case settled, the trial date vacated.

Settlement agreement filed in open court.
